visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins inside a Costco warehouse store. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a black vest, stands in front of a refrigerated shelf holding two large black bags of clam chowder. The lighting is bright and industrial, and product price tags are clearly visible. (2) The scene transitions to a close-up of a white, creamy soup with chunks of clams and potatoes being stirred in a metal pot with a black ladle in a kitchen setting. The lighting shifts to a warmer, domestic style. (3) The scene moves to an indoor living room where the woman, now wearing a teal turtleneck, sits at a wooden table tasting the soup from a yellow bowl with a yellow spoon. The background includes a brown couch and shelves with various items. She uses animated hand gestures and smiles. (4) In the final segment, two women sit together at the table, addressing the camera and demonstrating the product's consistency and pairing it with bread. The setting remains the same indoor living room.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 小朋友你在拿什麼. (2) [Variety]: 一袋250元. [Variety]: 成人版的海蚌濃湯. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇!一次兩袋對不對. [Subtitle]: 海底棒棒濃湯. (4) [Subtitle]: 一次兩袋總共是499元. [Subtitle]: 算一包算是250元. (5) [Subtitle]: 買的不便宜我們來看好不好喝. (6) [Subtitle]: 他這樣一袋有830克哎. [Subtitle]: 而且你知道他是從加拿大來的. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以他的飛機票值得了啦. [Subtitle]: 哇他是冰山蚌蛤蜊湯. (8) [Subtitle]: 有沒有棒棒回去試試看. (9) [Variety]: 非常地濃郁. [Variety]: 料超級多的. (10) [Variety]: 成人版的蛤蜊濃湯. [Variety]: 海蚌濃湯. (11) [Subtitle]: 他喝起來真是好棒棒. [Subtitle]: 他比一般的蛤蜊濃湯更濃縮. (12) [Subtitle]: 他的冰山蚌非常的多. [Subtitle]: 這個紅色的肉肉都是. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後湯也非常的濃郁. [Subtitle]: 馬鈴薯也有. (14) [Subtitle]: 這整個呢就是你一定要沾麵包. [Subtitle]: 然後想像自己在高級的西餐廳. (15) [Subtitle]: 高級的法式西餐廳. [Subtitle]: 然後一口麵包冷冷的天. (16) [Subtitle]: 哇哦!真的是非常高層次的享受. (17) [Subtitle]: 如果你是喜歡吃一些重海鮮呐. [Subtitle]: 烏魚子這種重口味的一定要試試看. (18) [Slogan]: 更濃郁風味的海蚌濃湯. (19) [Subtitle]: 但小提醒他是一個非常重口味的湯. (20) [Variety]: 非常重口味的湯. (21) [Subtitle]: 所以適合配麵包做濃湯麵包就好. (22) [Subtitle]: 然後也不用自己另外加熱水因為都不搭. (23) [Subtitle]: 嗯所有都不搭牛奶不搭豆漿不搭.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female creators present the product throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair, initially in a white shirt and black vest, later in a teal turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco refrigerated section with shelves and price tags followed by a home living room with a couch and decorated shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic female narration begins with a bright, high-pitched tone, speaking rapidly about a product at Costco. A medium-tempo acoustic guitar and shaker percussion BGM plays continuously underneath, creating a cheerful atmosphere. (2) A metallic clinking sound triggers as the scene shifts to stirring soup, accompanied by a slight bubble sound effect. The narration continues with high emotional arousal. (3) A ding sound effect marks a transition to the tasting phase. The voice becomes even more animated, emphasizing the flavor with rising intonation patterns. (4) The audio concludes with both female voices present, maintaining a friendly and helpful tone over the consistent BGM bed, ending with a final percussive thud SFX.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Tasting/Detailed Review -> Usage Tips
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a detailed review and recommendation for Anne's Table Clam Chowder purchased at Costco, explaining its value, ingredients, and best serving methods.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, price, and enthusiastic recommendation of the specific brand found at Costco.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and variety-show style text overlays to maintain high viewer engagement during a food review.
